Instrument.description: A single instrument in Flat's public catalog.

group.description: Group / family ID this instrument belongs to, e.g. `"keyboards"`.

id.description: Canonical instrument ID in `group.instrument` form, e.g. `"keyboards.piano"`.

premium.description: `true` when the instrument requires a paid Flat plan.

shortname.description: Short English label used on staves, e.g. `"Pno."`.

type.description: `"pitched"` for melodic instruments, `"unpitched"` for percussion / drum-style kits.

InstrumentGroup.description: A group / family of instruments (e.g. Keyboards, Brass), in catalog display order.

instruments.description: Instruments in this group, in catalog display order.

InstrumentType.description: Whether an instrument is pitched (melodic) or unpitched (percussion / drum-style kit).

description: Top-level shape of `data/instruments.json` — the published catalog.

groups.description: All instrument groups, in catalog display order.
